ddls:
CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated customer */,
  "opportunity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity type */,
  "annualized_arr_new" REAL /* Annualized recurring revenue (ARR) for the opportunity */,
  "renewal_member" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative assigned to the opportunity */,
  "total_contract_value" REAL /* Total contract value for the opportunity */,
  "total_opportunity_value" REAL /* Total opportunity value, including all related deals and revenues */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative assigned to the opportunity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the opportunity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the opportunity (e.g., open, closed won, closed lost) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the opportunity */,
  "expected_close_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the opportunity will close */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the opportunity (e.g., marketing campaign, referral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_opportunity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_type_id") REFERENCES opportunity_types ("opportunity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_renewal_member FOREIGN KEY ("renewal_member") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sales representative (e.g., sales representative, sales manager) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the sales representative belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative's manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sales representative was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry or sector the customer belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the customer's organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunity_types" (
  "opportunity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity type */,
  "opportunity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the opportunity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opportunity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the opportunity type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue forecast */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the forecast is associated with */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Revenue amount forecasted for the opportunity */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_forecasts_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_pipeline" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline entry */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity the pipeline entry is associated with */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the opportunity (e.g., prospecting, proposal, closed) */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of closing the opportunity */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Expected close date for the opportunity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pipeline entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the pipeline entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_pipeline_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)
